name: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (ChargePoint or the Company) is a leading provider of electric vehicle (EV) charging technology solutions to customers that want to offer EV charging, driving the transition to electric mobility across North America and Europe. ChargePoints vision is to create a seamless, ubiquitous, and accessible EV charging experience for all. Our mission is to simplify the transition to electric vehicles for everyone, from individual drivers to businesses and organizations...
